content_fingerprint: langgraph ships alpha 1 2 0 with graceful shutdown timer primitives and v2 projections the langchain ai orchestration library tagged its first alpha for the 1 2 release cycle bringing long requested improvements to state management checkpointing and task lifecycle control for production agent developers langgraph released version 1 2 0a1 on april 29 2026 marking the first alpha tag in the 1 2 release line the update encompasses 13 pull requests since version 1 1 10 spanning foundational internal restructuring and new runtime features notable additions include graceful graph shutdown and drain
